1.description: Broker Protocol inclusion by year. This figure plots the percentage of financial advisors in the industry that are covered by the Protocol (new and existing) by the end of each year on the left axis and the average size of firms (# of advisors) when entering the Protocol on the right axis. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

2.description: Job Transition around Protocol. This figure plots the coefficients ofProtocol×years to treatmentfrom the regressionChangeJobi,t=∑kβk(Protocoli×yearstotreatment)+γ·Controlsi,t+δi+δc,t+εi,t.We examine the likelihood of a job change by an advisor based on the status of Protocol membership in event time, where the event is when the advisor first enters into the Protocol. We include county-year fixed effects and control for advisor licensing and years of industry experience. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

3.description: Licensing changes around Protocol. This figure plots the coefficients ofProtocol×years to treatmentfrom the regressionLicensingi,t=∑kβk(Protocoli×yeartotreatment)+γ·Controlsi,t+δi+δc,t+εi,t.We examine changes in licensing by an advisor on interaction of Protocol membership in event time, where the event is when the advisor first enters into the Protocol. We include individual and county-year fixed effects and control for advisor licensing and years of industry experience. In Panels A–C, we test for becoming an investment adviser, acquiring additional sales licenses, and acquiring supervisory licenses, respectively. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]
